description: Contratos de integración entre layers. Valida que los archivos se respetan entre sí, no solo internamente.

integration_contracts.name: models_to_views
integration_contracts.description: Las vistas DEBEN acceder a los modelos únicamente a través de managers y services. No queries directas en views.

rules.statement: accounts/views.py MUST import from accounts/models.py only via managers or services — never raw QuerySet construction
accounts/views.py MUST NOT call Model.objects.filter() or Model.objects.get() directly — MUST delegate to managers
academicTutoring/views.py MUST use ClassSession.objects.get_tutor_sessions() and get_client_sessions() — not raw filters

integration_contracts.name: views_to_urls
integration_contracts.description: Cada URL DEBE apuntar a una vista que existe. Los kwargs de URL DEBEN coincidir con los parámetros de las vistas.

rules.statement: Every URL pattern in accounts/urls*.py MUST resolve to a view class that exists in accounts/views.py
Every URL pattern in academicTutoring/urls.py MUST resolve to a view class that exists in academicTutoring/views.py
No URL pattern MUST NOT reference a view that has been removed or renamed without updating the URL

integration_contracts.name: views_to_services
integration_contracts.description: Las vistas DEBEN delegar lógica de negocio a services.py. No lógica de negocio inline en views.

rules.statement: RegisterTutorView.form_valid() MUST call services.register_tutor() — not inline logic
RegisterClientView.form_valid() MUST call services.register_client() — not inline logic
academicTutoring/views.py MUST call academicTutoring/services.py for session lifecycle — create, confirm, cancel
No view MUST NOT contain transaction.atomic() blocks directly — MUST delegate to services

integration_contracts.name: cross_app_contracts
integration_contracts.description: Contratos entre apps. accounts y academicTutoring DEBEN interoperar sin acoplamiento directo en views ni circular imports.

rules.statement: academicTutoring/models.py MUST reference accounts models only via ForeignKey — no direct method calls across apps
accounts/models.py MUST NOT import from academicTutoring — dependency is one-directional: academicTutoring → accounts
TutorDashboardView MUST import ClassSession from academicTutoring.models inside method scope — not at module level to avoid circular imports
Field references across apps MUST use the actual field name — 'client' not 'student' in ClassSession.select_related()
